targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pingmesh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.topology_id == "${topology_id}" or "${topology_id}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rtt_p90" or r._field == "rtt_p99")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.path_type == "${path_type}" or "${path_type}" == "all")
  |> group(columns: ["_field", "path_type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "result")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pingmesh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.topology_id == "${topology_id}" or "${topology_id}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rtt_p99")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.path_type == "cross_rack")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> mean(column: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pingmesh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.topology_id == "${topology_id}" or "${topology_id}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rtt_p99")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.path_type == "same_rack")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> mean(column: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pingmesh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.topology_id == "${topology_id}" or "${topology_id}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "packet_loss")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.path_type == "${path_type}" or "${path_type}" == "all")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> max(column: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pingmesh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.topology_id == "${topology_id}" or "${topology_id}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rtt_p99" or r._field == "packet_loss")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.src_leaf == "${src_leaf}" or "${src_leaf}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.dst_leaf == "${dst_leaf}" or "${dst_leaf}" == "all")
  |> group(columns: ["src_leaf", "dst_leaf", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["src_leaf", "dst_leaf"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pingmesh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.topology_id == "${topology_id}" or "${topology_id}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rtt_p99" or r._field == "packet_loss")
  |> group(columns: ["src_leaf", "dst_leaf", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["src_leaf", "dst_leaf"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["rtt_p99"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 12)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pingmesh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.topology_id == "${topology_id}" or "${topology_id}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rtt_p99")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.src_leaf == "${src_leaf}" or "${src_leaf}" == "all")
  |> group(columns: ["dst_leaf"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pingmesh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.topology_id == "${topology_id}" or "${topology_id}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rtt_avg" or r._field == "rtt_p90" or r._field == "rtt_p99")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.src_name == "${src_host}" or "${src_host}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.dst_name == "${dst_host}" or "${dst_host}" == "all")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "result")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pingmesh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.topology_id == "${topology_id}" or "${topology_id}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rtt_p90")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.src_name == "${src_host}" or "${src_host}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.dst_name == "${dst_host}" or "${dst_host}" == "all")
  |> last()
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pingmesh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.topology_id == "${topology_id}" or "${topology_id}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rtt_p99")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.src_name == "${src_host}" or "${src_host}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.dst_name == "${dst_host}" or "${dst_host}" == "all")
  |> last()
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pingmesh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.topology_id == "${topology_id}" or "${topology_id}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "packet_loss")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.src_name == "${src_host}" or "${src_host}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.dst_name == "${dst_host}" or "${dst_host}" == "all")
  |> last()
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pingmesh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.topology_id == "${topology_id}" or "${topology_id}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rtt_avg" or r._field == "rtt_p90" or r._field == "rtt_p99" or r._field == "packet_loss")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.src_name == "${src_host}" or "${src_host}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.dst_name == "${dst_host}" or "${dst_host}" == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.path_type == "${path_type}" or "${path_type}" == "all")
  |> group(columns: ["src_name", "dst_name", "src_leaf", "dst_leaf", "path_type", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["src_name", "dst_name", "src_leaf", "dst_leaf", "path_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["rtt_p99"], desc: true)

list.definition:
buckets()
  |> keep(columns: ["name"])
  |> rename(columns: {name: "_value"})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == "netopsbench" or r._value =~ /^network_data_.*/)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"])
list.label: Bucket
list.name: bucket
list.query:
buckets()
  |> keep(columns: ["name"])
  |> rename(columns: {name: "_value"})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == "netopsbench" or r._value =~ /^network_data_.*/)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"])

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "${bucket}",
  tag: "src_leaf",
  predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "pingmesh" and (r.topology_id == "${topology_id}" or "${topology_id}" == "all"),
  start: -1h
)
list.label: Source Leaf
list.name: src_leaf
